critical_errors.impact: High - Search engines cannot identify the main topic of your page.
critical_errors.recommendation: Add exactly one <h1> tag containing your primary target keyword.

warnings.recommendation: Expand homepage text to a minimum of 300 words to establish topical authority.

warnings.impact: Medium - Found 1 dead-end or generic social media links.
warnings.recommendation: Update social icons to point to your actual brand profiles, or remove them.

core_web_vitals: Not tested (API Key missing or failed)

risk_factors: Domain age hidden (privacy protected — common for legit sites)
✅ Domain doesn’t appear to imitate known brands
❌ Low traffic (Global Rank #10,531,283) — possibly new or suspicious
